templates.name: First_Email
templates.subject: Exclusive Partnership Opportunity for {Organization} | World AI Summit, Hosted by Department of IT, BT Government of Karnataka in Partnership with Elets Technomedia

templates.name: Follow up 1
templates.body:
Hello {Name},
Hope you are doing well.

Following my previous email sharing details of the 2nd World AI Summit 2025 presented by NxtGen, organised by Elets Technomedia in Host Partnership with the Dept. of IT, BT, Govt. of Karnataka, scheduled for 25–26 September 2025 at Sheraton Grand Bangalore Hotel, Brigade Gateway, Bengaluru.

With a legacy of hosting 500+ high-impact technology and innovation summits across eGovernance, digital transformation, and enterprise technology, Elets is proud to bring this grand AI leadership platform to Bengaluru, India's AI and innovation capital.

The summit is being hosted in collaboration with:

  • Department of Electronics, IT, BT, and S&T, Government of Karnataka - Host Partner

  • Karnataka Digital Economy Mission (KDEM) - Strategic Partner

  • IndiaAI Mission, MeitY, Govt. of India - Co-Host Partner

We are honoured to have Shri Abhishek Singh, Additional Secretary, MeitY | CEO, IndiaAI Mission | DG, NIC joining as Keynote Speaker.

Summit Highlights:

  • 150+ Speakers from Government, Global AI Labs, BFSI, Enterprises, Startups, GCCs & VCs

  • 1200+ Stakeholders, including leaders from:

    • Government: Information Technology, Power, Finance, Health, Transport, Education, PSUs & more

    • Enterprise & Industry: Manufacturing, Automobile, Healthcare & Pharma, BFSI, Logistics, D2C & e-Commerce, GCCs, Startups & MSMEs

  • 30+ Policymakers & Regulators

  • 50+ Technology & Solution Providers

  • Dedicated Government & Enterprise Tracks

  • Strategic alignment with AI Impact Summit 2026, MeitY, including a special roadshow at the World AI Summit

This convergence of policy, innovation, and industry leadership will position Bengaluru as the epicenter of the AI revolution, driving large-scale adoption, showcasing real-world use cases, and enabling next-gen collaborations.

Event Brochure - Click to Download

Few Confirmed Partners:

  • NxtGen - Presenting Partner
  • AWS - Silver Partner
  • Lauren Group - Silver Partner
  • d-Matrix - Bronze Partner
  • Lenovo - EntepriseAI Partner
  • Diligent - AI Governance & Compliane Partner
  • Fortinet - Cybersecurity Partner
  • Hitachi Vantara - Bronze Partner
  • Yotta - Exclusive Partner
  • DronaHQ - Exhibitor
  • Paysprint - Startup Partner
& more joining soon...

Here are some of the Esteemed Leaders Confirmed to Speak at the 2nd World AI Summit (and the list keeps growing..)

Who is Attending?

  • IT & Digital Transformation Secretaries from central and state governments

  • Senior Officials from MeitY, IndiaAI, Bhashini, DPIIT, NITI Aayog, DST, and RBIH

  • Chief Scientists, CTOs, CIOs, and CDOs from top AI companies, enterprise tech teams, and government bodies

  • Founders, MDs, EDs, and CEOs of high-growth AI startups, unicorns, and enterprise AI providers

  • Professors, Deans, and Researchers from top AI research institutions and universities

  • EVPs, SVPs, VPs, GMs, Heads of AI, Data Science, and ML Engineering from leading enterprises

  • Global Capability Center (GCC) Leaders driving AI adoption across functions

  • Directors and Partners from leading VC firms, accelerators, and innovation labs

  • Public Sector Decision-Makers leading AI for Governance, Education, Healthcare, and Urban Transformation

  • Policymakers and Think Tanks focused on AI regulation, ethics, and societal impact

  • Partners and Directors of VC Firms and Investment Divisions & many more

Key Topics of Discussion - World AI Summit 2025
  • AI for Governance & Public Good
  • Enterprise AI & GCC Innovation
  • GenAI, LLMs & Agentic AI
  • Data & Platform Engineering
  • AI Startups, DeepTech & Investments
  • AI in Core Sectors – Healthcare, Power, Mobility, Logistics, Agritech, Education, Finance & more
Attachments: Key Confirmed Speakers Flyer & Draft Agenda

We are looking forward to hear your final plan for participation.

Opportunities like this come once a year, let’s secure your presence before the ecosystem's biggest names take center stage.

Also, follow our LinkedIn for daily updates on this revolutionary event: Click Here

Looking forward to hearing from you.

templates.name: Follow up 2
templates.body:
Dear {Name}

I hope this note finds you well.

Following up on my earlier message, I’d like to share why the 2nd World AI Summit 2025 (worldaisummit.com) on 25–26 September at Sheraton Grand Bengaluru) is being recognised as the defining AI leadership platform for India and the region.

Why This Summit is a Landmark

  • India’s AI Moment
    India is on track to become a $17B+ AI market by 2027, driven by rapid adoption across enterprises, startups, and GCCs. With IndiaAI Mission, MeitY as Co-Host Partner and the Department of IT & BT, Government of Karnataka as Host Partner, the summit is strategically aligned with national and state-level AI roadmaps.

  • The GCC AI Revolution
    India is now home to 1,800+ Global Capability Centers (GCCs), many transforming into AI Centers of Excellence for their global operations. Leaders from Barclays, Fidelity, State Street, Adani, ABB, and Commonwealth Bank and 80+ already confirmed  are already confirmed to share strategies on scaling AI from India for the world.

  • Enterprise AI in Action
    CXOs from Reliance Retail, Apollo Tyres, Aditya Birla Group, Marico, Tata Starbucks, Uber, L’Oréal India, and CEAT will showcase real use-cases of GenAI, LLMs, automation, and AI-driven decision-making—offering unique peer-to-peer learning on what works at enterprise scale.

  • Policy & Governance Leadership
    With 30+ policymakers the platform doubles up as a policy–industry dialogue to shape the future of AI adoption, governance, and ethical frameworks.

Why Your Presence is Critical

  • Unmissable Visibility: Partners like NxtGen, Fortinet, Hitachi Vantara, Lenovo and many partners have already confirmed. This is the ecosystem’s most watched stage for AI in India now and waiting a year you miss the deals, conversations and opportunities. 

  • High-value Networking: With  150+ speakers, 35+ technology solution providers, and 30+ regulators, this is where investments, collaborations, and partnerships are sealed.

  • Future-proof Positioning: The summit also serves as the gateway to the IndiaAI Impact Summit 2026, ensuring your brand stays at the center of the AI growth narrative.

This is a once-a-year opportunity to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with leaders defining India’s AI future. I’d be delighted to explore how we can position your brand to gain maximum strategic visibility and business impact at the summit.

Would you be available for a quick call this week to finalize your participation?

Looking forward to your response.

templates.name: Follow up 3
templates.body:
Hi {Name},

Excited to announce that Mr. Vishal Dhupar, Managing Director South Asia, NVIDIA, has been confirmed as a Keynote Speaker at the World AI Summit 2025. This further strengthens the summit’s position as India’s defining AI leadership platform.

Adding to the momentum, 15+ leading partners including NxtGen, SAP, Cloudflare, Lenovo, and several other industry frontrunners have already confirmed their participation.

With global AI pioneers, top enterprises, GCC leaders, and policymakers converging, this summit is shaping up to be the most influential AI gathering of the year in India and the region.I 

I know you must be weighing ROI from event investments, so let me break down exactly what you get if we lock your participation this week in the World AI Summit 2025 (worldaisummit.com) (Sept 25–26, Bengaluru). The event is set to. be India's biggest and most strategic Ai gathering.

1. Pipeline Acceleration 

  • 1000+ stakeholders from BFSI, manufacturing, retail, healthcare, mobility, startups, GCCs and governments

  • Curated 1:1 meetings with GCC and enterprise leaders aligned to your ICP 

  • Average partner ROI = 4–6 months of pipeline acceleration from two days of concentrated access.

2. Peer Validation

  • Present alongside leaders from Reliance, Aditya Birla, Tata Starbucks, Marico, Uber, L’Oréal, CEAT and GCC heads from Barclays, Fidelity, ABB, State Street, Adani, Commonwealth Bank.

  • If you’re not there, your competitors own the GenAI/LLM/automation narrative.

3. Policy Edge

  • 30+ policymakers from MeitY, Govt. of Karnataka, NITI Aayog, and regulators.

  • Participation includes closed-door dialogues, rare access where regulations are being drafted.

4. Visibility

  • Branding across on-site, digital, and pre-event comms.

  • Speaker slot options still open (closing this week).

  • Multi-platform coverage via Elets Media (4.5M monthly reach).

Decision point:
We have 3 late-cycle participation models designed for fast ROI:

  • Impact Leadership : Stage + curated 1:1 meetings + full branding.

  • Deal Room : Showcase pod + GCC buyer access + post-event lead report.

  • Governance Track : Sponsor the AI Trust & India AI Vision Track 

Let’s finalize this in a quick 30 min call.

templates.name: Follow up 4
templates.body:
Hi {Name},

We are now just 9 days away from India’s Biggest AI stage and event.

Excited to share that Vishal Dhupar, Managing Director South Asia, NVIDIA & Suvendu Pati, Chief General Manager, Reserve Bank of India, are confirmed as Keynote Speakers at the 2nd World AI Summit 2025 (worldaisummit.com) (Sept 25–26, Bengaluru) further cementing the summit as India’s defining AI leadership platform. (Full list of confirmed speakers attached below) 

Already, 20+ leading partners including NxtGen, SAP, Cloudflare, Lenovo, and other global frontrunners have confirmed their participation.

With AI pioneers, Fortune 500 enterprises, GCC leaders, and top policymakers converging, this will be the most influential AI gathering of the year in India and the region.

Latest Confirmed Partners

  • Host Partner: Department of IT, BT, Government of Karnataka
  • Co-Host Partner: IndiaAI Mission (MeitY)
  • Presenting Partner: NxtGen
  • Gold Partners: Cloudflare, SAP
  • Lanyard Partner: Vdart
  • Strategic Partner: KDEM
  • AI Partner: Lenovo
  • Silver Partner: Lauren
  • Bronze Partner: D-Matrix
  • Governance & Compliance Partner: Diligent
  • AI Transformation Partner Partner : Yubi
  • Associate Partner: Branch X
  • Ecosystem: ArtPark, ACSEL Technology Forum
  • Exhibitors: Drona HQ, NoBroker
  • Supporting Partner: RVAI
  • Startup Partner: PaySprint
  • Partner: IT Cart
  • Human Digital Workforce Partner: Allied Worldwide
  • Supporting Partners: MeitY Startup Hub, Office of the Principal Scientific Advisor

I know ROI is top of mind for you, so here’s exactly what participation unlocks:

1. Pipeline Acceleration

  • 1000+ stakeholders from BFSI, manufacturing, retail, healthcare, mobility, startups, GCCs, and government
  • Curated 1:1 meetings with enterprise and GCC leaders aligned to your ICP
  • Avg. partner ROI: 4–6 months pipeline acceleration from two days of concentrated access

2. Peer Validation

  • Present alongside leaders from Reliance, Aditya Birla, Tata Starbucks, Marico, Uber, L’Oréal, CEAT
  • GCC heads from Barclays, Fidelity, ABB, State Street, Adani, Commonwealth Bank
  • If you’re not there, competitors own the GenAI, LLM, automation narrative

3. Policy Edge

  • 30+ policymakers from MeitY, Govt. of Karnataka, NITI Aayog, regulators
  • Includes closed-door dialogues shaping India’s AI policy framework

4. Visibility

  • Branding across on-site, digital, and pre-event comms
  • Speaker slots still open (closing this week)
  • Multi-platform coverage via Elets Media (4.5M monthly reach)
  • Participation Models (fast ROI)
  • Impact Leadership: Stage + curated 1:1 meetings + full branding
  • Deal Room: Showcase pod + GCC buyer access + post-event lead report
  • Governance Track: Sponsor the AI Trust & India AI Vision Track

This week is the decision window. Let's lock your participation and ensure your brand leads the AI conversation at India’s biggest and most strategic AI gathering.

Let’s connect to finalize your slot.
